sentences.target: Ich tippe elektro- in die Überschrift.

translations.de: Ich tippe elektro- in die Überschrift.
translations.en: I'm typing elektro- into the title.
translations.fr: Je tape elektro- dans le titre.
translations.vi: Tôi gõ elektro- vào tiêu đề.
translations.nl: Ik typ elektro- in de titel.
translations.hu: Beírom az elektro- kifejezést a címbe.
translations.hi: मैं शीर्षक में elektro- टाइप कर रही हूँ।
translations.ja: タイトルにelektro-を入力しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st singular; main predicate, transitive.
Cited orthographic item (bound morpheme with hyphen) functioning as a direct object.
Preposition governing accusative here (direction), introducing the PP target.
Definite article, feminine accusative, determiner of 'Überschrift'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Er schreibt elektro- groß auf die Verpackung.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ʃʁaɪpt eˈlɛktʁo ɡʁoːs aʊf diː fɛɐ̯ˈpakʊŋ/

translations.de: Er schreibt elektro- groß auf die Verpackung.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ʃʁaɪpt eˈlɛktʁo ɡʁoːs aʊf diː fɛɐ̯ˈpakʊŋ/
translations.en: He writes elektro- big on the packaging.
translations.es: Escribe elektro- en grande en la caja.
translations.fr: Il écrit elektro- en gros sur l’emballage.
translations.it: Scrive elektro- in grande sulla confezione.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在包装上把elektro-写得很大。
translations.yue: 佢喺包裝上面用大字寫elektro-。
translations.ru: Он пишет на упаковке elektro- крупными буквами.
translations.pt: Ele escreve elektro- em letras grandes na embalagem.
translations.he: הוא כותב elektro- בגדול על האריזה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy viết elektro- thật to lên bao bì.
translations.ar: يكتب elektro- بحجم كبير على العبوة.
translations.nl: Hij schrijft elektro- groot op de verpakking.
translations.uk: Він великими літерами пише elektro- на упаковці.
translations.hu: Nagy betűkkel ráírja az elektro- feliratot a csomagolásra.
translations.hi: वह पैकेजिंग पर elektro- बड़े अक्षरों में लिखता है।
translations.pl: Pisze elektro- dużymi literami na opakowaniu.
translations.el: Γράφει το elektro- με μεγάλα γράμματα στη συσκευασία.
translations.nb: Han skriver elektro- med store bokstaver på emballasjen.
translations.id: Dia menulis elektro- dengan huruf besar di kemasan.
translations.sv: Han skriver elektro- med stora bokstäver på förpackningen.
translations.ro: Scrie elektro- cu litere mari pe ambalaj.
translations.cs: Píše elektro- velkými písmeny na obalu.
translations.da: Han skriver elektro- med store bogstaver på emballagen.
translations.fi: Hän kirjoittaa pakkaukseen elektro- isoin kirjaimin.
translations.ja: 箱にelektro-を大きく書いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd singular; main predicate.
Cited orthographic item functioning as the direct object.
Adverbial usage of the adjective (manner), indicating the writing size/capitalization.
Preposition governing accusative (direction), introducing the destination PP; not a separable verb particle here.
Definite article, feminine accusative, determiner of 'Verpackung'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Auf dem Schild steht elektro- ganz oben.
sentences.reading: /aʊf deːm ʃɪlt ʃteːt eˈlɛktʁo ɡants ˈoːbən/

translations.de: Auf dem Schild steht elektro- ganz oben.
translations.ipa: /aʊf deːm ʃɪlt ʃteːt eˈlɛktʁo ɡants ˈoːbən/
translations.en: On the sign, elektro- is at the top.
translations.es: En el cartel, elektro- está arriba.
translations.fr: Sur l’affiche, elektro- est en haut.
translations.it: Sul cartello, elektro- è in alto.
translations.pt: No cartaz, elektro- está no topo.
translations.vi: Trên tấm biển, elektro- ở trên cùng.
translations.nl: Op het bord staat elektro- bovenaan.
translations.hu: A táblán legfelül az elektro- szerepel.
translations.hi: साइन पर elektro- सबसे ऊपर है।
translations.pl: Na tabliczce elektro- jest u góry.
translations.el: Στην πινακίδα, το elektro- είναι στην κορυφή.
translations.id: Di papan itu, elektro- ada di paling atas.
translations.sv: På skylten står elektro- högst upp.
translations.ro: Pe afiș, elektro- este în partea de sus.
translations.cs: Na ceduli je elektro- úplně nahoře.
translations.ja: 掲示ではelektro-がいちばん上にある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative (location), introducing the PP setting.
Definite article, dative neuter (for 'Schild'), determiner within the PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'Auf'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'is positioned'.
Cited orthographic item functioning as the subject (nominative).
Degree adverb intensifying 'oben' ('ganz oben' = 'at the very top').
Locative adverb; complements 'steht' to indicate position.

sentences.target: Sein Entwurf zeigt elektro- in Neonfarben.

translations.de: Sein Entwurf zeigt elektro- in Neonfarben.
translations.en: His design shows elektro- in neon colors.
translations.es: Su diseño muestra elektro- en colores neón.
translations.fr: Son design montre elektro- en couleurs néon.
translations.it: Il suo design mostra elektro- in colori al neon.
translations.ko: 그의 디자인은 elektro-를 네온 색으로 보여준다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他的设计用霓虹色呈现elektro-。
translations.yue: 佢個設計用霓虹色顯示elektro-。
translations.ru: В его дизайне elektro- выполнено в неоновых цветах.
translations.pt: O design dele mostra elektro- em cores neon.
translations.he: העיצוב שלו מציג elektro- בצבעי ניאון.
translations.tr: Tasarımında elektro- neon renklerde yer alıyor.
translations.vi: Thiết kế của anh ấy thể hiện elektro- với màu neon.
translations.nl: Zijn ontwerp toont elektro- in neonkleuren.
translations.uk: У його дизайні elektro- виконано неоновими кольорами.
translations.hu: A terve neon színekben mutatja az elektro- feliratot.
translations.hi: उसके डिज़ाइन में elektro- नियॉन रंगों में दिखता है।
translations.pl: W jego projekcie elektro- jest w neonowych kolorach.
translations.el: Το σχέδιό του δείχνει το elektro- με νέον χρώματα.
translations.nb: Designet hans viser elektro- i neonfarger.
translations.id: Desainnya menampilkan elektro- dalam warna neon.
translations.sv: Hans design visar elektro- i neonfärger.
translations.ro: Designul lui arată elektro- în culori neon.
translations.cs: Jeho návrh zobrazuje elektro- v neonových barvách.
translations.da: Hans design viser elektro- i neonfarver.
translations.ja: 彼のデザインはelektro-をネオンカラーで表現している。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Entwurf'.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd singular; transitive predicate.
Cited orthographic item functioning as the direct object.
Preposition introducing a PP of manner; here read with dative plural.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition 'in' (manner/style).
